title: delphinium austriacum
intro: Delphinium austriacum, also known as Austrian larkspur, is a perennial plant in the delphinium genus that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Delphinium austriacum include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory conditions. Delphinium austriacum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical cream, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
